title: (Bullish Signal) SYNH, entered Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on May 13, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that SYNH's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 79 similar cases where SYNH's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 65 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 82%. Current price $86.13 crossed the resistance line at $84.87 and is trading between $91.16 resistance and $84.87 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 04/13/21 - 05/13/21, the price experienced a +8% Uptrend. During the week of 05/06/21 - 05/13/21, the stock enjoyed a +5% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/ebaw3xm454z61.png?width=1521&format=png&auto=webp&s=56831cd6a76f06fef4f030ad5a957216d8199c66

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 39 of 47 cases where SYNH's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on May 13, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on SYNH as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 65 of 79 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

Following a +3.76% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where SYNH advanced for three days, in 262 of 348 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 75%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 240 of 333 cases where SYNH Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 72%.
